## Runtime.collectionContains() function

Creates a filter that checks if a collection contains a value.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function collectionContains<T, V>(value: V, getter: (item: T) => ReadonlyArray<V> | undefined): FilterPredicate<T>;
```
